SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-10-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SCOTT BORROWMAN. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MARVIN RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GE TOWING AUTO REPAIR & BODY SHOP IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, MARVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GE TOWING AUTO REPAIR & BODY SHOP $1,118.13 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,208.13, $1,118.13 FOR RENTAL REIMBURSEMENT NOT COVERED BY INSURANCE. PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF REGARDING OTHER REQUESTED RELIEF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
